title: Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal
tagline: Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal, Kerala

overview.short: Karyat Sree Ayyappa-Bhagavathi Temple is situated in Kallachi Vanimel road in Vanimal, kerala.
overview.description: Karyat Sree Ayyappa-Bhagavathi Temple is situated in Kallachi Vanimel road in Vanimal, kerala. The presiding deity in this temple is Lord Ayyappa. It was started as a small Bhajana Madam in the year 1987. The temple's ISIC codes are 9491 and SIC codes are 8661.

topPlaces.description: Vilangad is a village in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India. Vilangad is a small town located northeast of Kozhikode city bordering Wayanad and Kannur districts.

topPlaces.name: Nadapuram
topPlaces.description: Nadapuram is a census town and a special grade panchayath located in Kozhikode District of Kerala, coming under Nadapuram assembly constituency. It is in the North Malabar region of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (123 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal?
faq.a: Stays in Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karyat Sree Ayyappa Temple Vanimal?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vanimal, Valayam, Vilangad, Nadapuram, Kallachi.
